value.stringValue: User entered billing info, starting Tokenization
Screenflow - Chargent - New Credit Card started by {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}
Multiple Gateways found. User will be offered a choice
One Gateway found and assigned as tokenization gateway id {!txt_GatewayId}
Tokenization Failed, returning to billing info screen

actionCalls.description: Tokenizes the credit card and creates a payment method that can be used later to make a charge
actionCalls.name: Tokenize_Credit_Card
actionCalls.label: Tokenize Credit Card

decisions.description: Check if there are multiple gateway options present. If yes, assign the selected one
decisions.name: Are_there_multiple_Gateways_present
decisions.label: Are there multiple Gateways present

decisions.name: Does_User_Have_Custom_Permission_Assigned
decisions.label: Does User Have Custom Permission Assigned

decisions.description: Check if the CC was tokenized successfully
decisions.name: Was_Tokenization_Successfull
decisions.label: Was Tokenization Successfull

decisions.description: Checks if the flow was started from Account, Opportunity or Order record based on the passed in recordId
decisions.name: What_Object_Was_Flow_Triggered_From
decisions.label: What Object Was Flow Triggered From

Flow.description: Screenflow used to add a new credit card as a tokenized chargent payment method

formulas.description: Returns true if expiration date is in correct format and card is not expired
formulas.name: bool_FinalExpirationValidation

formulas.description: Checks if all address values are passed in
formulas.name: bool_ValidAddressInfo
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.country})), OR( NOT( OR( LOWER({!Billing_Address.country}) = "united states", LOWER({!Billing_Address.country}) = "usa", LOWER({!Billing_Address.country}) = "u.s.", LOWER({!Billing_Address.country}) = "u.s.a", LOWER({!Billing_Address.country}) = "us" ) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.street})), NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.city})), NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.postalCode})), NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.province})) ) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.street})), NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.city})), NOT(ISBLANK({!Billing_Address.postalCode})) ) )

formulas.name: text_ExpirationErrorMessage
formulas.expression: IF( NOT({!bool_IsExpirationDateInCorrectFormat}), "Please enter a valid expiration date in MM/YY format (e.g., 08/29).", IF( NOT({!bool_IsCardValid}), "Credit Card expired. Please enter a valid Credit Card.", "" ) )

formulas.description: Returns N/A if there is no state entered which covers for the international addresses
formulas.name: txt_BillingState

Flow.label: Screenflow - Chargent - New Credit Card

loops.description: Loop through Gateway Collection to get ID
loops.name: Loop_through_Gateway_Collection
loops.label: Loop through Gateway Collection

recordLookups.description: Get Authorize.net gateways. We will use the record type Id 0120b000000EuaYAAS to identify them
recordLookups.name: Get_Gateway
recordLookups.label: Get Gateway

screens.description: Screen used to enter billing info for ne Credit Card
screens.name: Billing_Info_Screen
screens.label: Billing Info Screen

validationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure to fill all the address fields before proceeding
Please enter a valid Credit Card number containing up to 16 digits.

fields.name: Expiration_Date
fields.helpText: Enter Expiration date in the MM/YY format

fields.name: error_message
fields.fieldText:
Flow Automation Error:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: failure_message
fields.fieldText:
{!$Label.Style_Header_Red}

Failed to add a credit card!

{!Tokenize_Credit_Card.message}

value.stringValue: For who would you like to add a new Credit Card

fields.name: No_Gateway_Message
fields.fieldText: No matching Payment Gateways found!

fields.name: Not_Supported_Message
fields.fieldText:
Credit Card creation not supported from this object.

This feature can be used only from Account, Opportunity or Order record

fields.name: success_message
fields.fieldText:
{!$Label.Style_Header_Green}

﻿

Successfully added Credit Card!

screens.name: User_Doesn_t_Have_Permissions_to_Create_Credit_Cards
screens.label: User Doesn't Have Permissions to Create Credit Cards

fields.name: displayText_UserDoesntHavePermissions
fields.fieldText: You do not have permission to create a credit card. Due to new PCI compliance rules, we can no longer take credit card numbers over the phone. Please send the customer a Payment Request Link via email for them to complete their payment. If needed, a manager can assist with adding a credit card and processing the payment.

variables.description: Are there more that 1 Gateway available
variables.name: bool_MultipleGateways
